headline: DTE’s Aggressive Rate Hikes And Data Center Push Could Be A Game Changer For DTE Energy (DTE)
summary: DTE Energy has recently moved to implement a $242.4 million electricity rate increase for Michigan customers and has already signaled plans to seek another hike for 2027, while also introducing a $2.99 processing fee on card payments and pursuing over 4.4 gigawatts of power allocations for data centers across the state. This cluster of decisions highlights the tension between DTE’s capital-intensive push to upgrade reliability and serve data centers, and growing political and customer...
